'''ây-b-y''' ('''yabaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:essoyne|essoyne]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:essoyne|essoyne]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-b-y
|-
! Lemma
| yabaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yabayithi|yabayithi]] || [[word:yabayiji|yabayiji]] || [[word:yabayishi|yabayishi]] || [[word:yabayi|yabayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yabayuthuth|yabayuthuth]] || [[word:yabayujuj|yabayujuj]] || [[word:yabayushush|yabayushush]] || [[word:yabay|yabay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yabayuthu|yabayuthu]] || [[word:yabayuju|yabayuju]] || [[word:yabayushu|yabayushu]] || [[word:yabayu|yabayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yabayufuth|yabayufuth]] || [[word:yabayufuj|yabayufuj]] || [[word:yabayufush|yabayufush]] || [[word:yabayuf|yabayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yabayethe|yabayethe]] || [[word:yabayeje|yabayeje]] || [[word:yabayeshe|yabayeshe]] || [[word:yabaye|yabaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yabayothoth|yabayothoth]] || [[word:yabayojoj|yabayojoj]] || [[word:yabayoshosh|yabayoshosh]] || [[word:yabay|yabay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yabayotho|yabayotho]] || [[word:yabayojo|yabayojo]] || [[word:yabayosho|yabayosho]] || [[word:yabayo|yabayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yabayofoth|yabayofoth]] || [[word:yabayofoj|yabayofoj]] || [[word:yabayofosh|yabayofosh]] || [[word:yabayof|yabayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yabayĂŠthĂŠ|yabayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yabayĂŠjĂŠ|yabayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yabayĂŠshĂŠ|yabayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yabayĂŠ|yabayĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yabayathath|yabayathath]] || [[word:yabayajaj|yabayajaj]] || [[word:yabayashash|yabayashash]] || [[word:yabay|yabay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yabayatha|yabayatha]] || [[word:yabayaja|yabayaja]] || [[word:yabayasha|yabayasha]] || [[word:yabaya|yabaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yabayafath|yabayafath]] || [[word:yabayafaj|yabayafaj]] || [[word:yabayafash|yabayafash]] || [[word:yabayaf|yabayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yabayasha|yabayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyabayasha|goyabayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyabayasha|gokiyabayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yabaynĂŒsha|yabaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyabaynknĂŒsha|goyabaynknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyabaynĂŒsha|gokiyabaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yabayshĂ«sha|yabayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyabaynkshĂ«sha|goyabaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyabayshĂ«sha|gokiyabayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yabayrosha|yabayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyabaynkrosha|goyabaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyabayrosha|gokiyabayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yabaymusha|yabaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyabaynkmusha|goyabaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyabaymusha|gokiyabaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yabaysherasha|yabaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyabaynksherasha|goyabaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyabaysherasha|gokiyabaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yabayngasha|yabayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyabaynkngasha|goyabaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyabayngasha|gokiyabayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yabayasha|yabayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyabaynkyasha|goyabaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyabayasha|gokiyabayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yabayamasha|yabayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyabaynkyamasha|goyabaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyabayamasha|gokiyabayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yabaynĂŒshĂ«sha|yabaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyabaynknĂŒshĂ«sha|goyabaynknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyabaynĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiyabaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yabaynĂŒrosha|yabaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyabaynknĂŒrosha|goyabaynknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyabaynĂŒrosha|gokiyabaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yabaynĂŒmusha|yabaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyabaynknĂŒmusha|goyabaynknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyabaynĂŒmusha|gokiyabaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yabayshĂ«nĂŒsha|yabayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyabaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goyabaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyabayshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiyabayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yabayshĂ«rosha|yabayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyabaynkshĂ«rosha|goyabaynkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyabayshĂ«rosha|gokiyabayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yabayshĂ«musha|yabayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyabaynkshĂ«musha|goyabaynkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyabayshĂ«musha|gokiyabayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yabayronĂŒsha|yabayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyabaynkronĂŒsha|goyabaynkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyabayronĂŒsha|gokiyabayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yabayroshĂ«sha|yabayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyabaynkroshĂ«sha|goyabaynkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyabayroshĂ«sha|gokiyabayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yabayromusha|yabayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyabaynkromusha|goyabaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyabayromusha|gokiyabayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yabaymunĂŒsha|yabaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyabaynkmunĂŒsha|goyabaynkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyabaymunĂŒsha|gokiyabaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yabaymushĂ«sha|yabaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyabaynkmushĂ«sha|goyabaynkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyabaymushĂ«sha|gokiyabaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yabaymurosha|yabaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyabaynkmurosha|goyabaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyabaymurosha|gokiyabaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yabay|yabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yĂŠbĂŠy|yĂŠbĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyabay|hoyabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyĂŠbĂŠy|hoyĂŠbĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyabay|hohoyabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyĂŠbĂŠy|hohoyĂŠbĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒyabay|nĂŒyabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒyĂŠbĂŠy|nĂŒyĂŠbĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyabay|nĂŒnĂŒyabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠbĂŠy|nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠbĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻyabay|nĂŻyabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻyĂŠbĂŠy|nĂŻyĂŠbĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyabay|nĂŻnĂŻyabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠbĂŠy|nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠbĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyabay|luyabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyĂŠbĂŠy|luyĂŠbĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyabay|luluyabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyĂŠbĂŠy|luluyĂŠbĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyabay|liyabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyĂŠbĂŠy|liyĂŠbĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyabay|liliyabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyĂŠbĂŠy|liliyĂŠbĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyabay|koyabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyĂŠbĂŠy|koyĂŠbĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyabay|kokoyabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyĂŠbĂŠy|kokoyĂŠbĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyabay|keyabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyĂŠbĂŠy|keyĂŠbĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyabay|kekeyabay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyĂŠbĂŠy|kekeyĂŠbĂŠy]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
